tax: Placed at class rank, Water Elementals is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a pure water-element body, liquid or ice, animated by water-pressure and bound to a source. A new order belongs here only if it shows a distinct water-state body-plan with its own source and field signs.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a standing column, foam-churn, creeping rime, or hail-cloud where water should behave normally. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — a windless standing wave, scoured plunge-pool, breath-frost, or melting hail — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Water Elementals occupies sumps, pools, falls, cold seeps, and cold updraft shafts. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where water-pressure animates still water, moving water, a cold seep, or a chilled updraft and recur with the sump refills, the fall runs, or the cold source re-chills, sustaining themselves on water-pressure, falling-water energy, or cold-seep and updraft chill.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: members hide as ordinary water, frost, or mist and rouse to intrusion, drowning, battering, locking, or pelting. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: a water or ice body, immunity to cutting and to its own state, and a freezing or warmth failure. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each order and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: surging, battering, freezing, and hail-shot. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Water Elementals matters because they make every body of water and patch of cold a drowning, battering, or immobilising trap. It lets survey reports sort water hazards by state, so a crew knows whether to sound a pool, rope below a fall, or move fast through cold without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Water Elementals is the class-rank grouping of true elementals composed of the water element, liquid and frozen within the True Elementals. Its members share a body of water — liquid or ice — bound to a water source, drawing mass from it rather than breeding, and divide below into order groups by whether the water is liquid (Fluvial) or frozen (Glacial). Water is the Stillwardens' and Mist-Touched scouts' chief elemental concern, lurking in every sump, fall, seep, and cold shaft.
